---
title: "Annual Imaging Symposium"
description: "The annual imaging symposium"
author: "Tristan van Leeuwen"
date: "2026-02-20"
categories: [event]
image: "/posts/symposium26/IMG_2360.jpeg"
#css: /custom.css
#draft: true
---

The annual imaging symposium took place on February 20th at the VU.

# Program

09.30 – 09.45 - Walk in coffee

09.45 – 10.00 - Introduction

10:00 – 10:30 - Daniela Huppenkothen (UvA) Imaging in Astronomy

10:30 – 11:00 - Peter Kraus (ARCNL) When Resolution Is (Not) Everything: Imaging Complex Materials and Devices

11:00 – 11:30 - Short break

11:30 – 12:00 - Martijn de Bruin (Amsterdam UMC) Imaging Tomorrow: How Technology Is Redefining Diagnosis and therapy

12:00 – 14:30 - Lunch Break & Posters

14:30 – 15:00 - Kristina Ganzinger (AMOLF) Live microscopy: cracking the challenge to image biology unfolding in cells, tissues and organoids

15:00 – 15:30 - Mason Scholte (UvA) Practical imaging in archaeology: Examples from the 4D Research Lab

15:30 – 16:00 - Brainstorm session “Building the Hub:” Events, Education, etc.

16:00 – 17:00 - Borrel & Posters

<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
